description: The AudioStreamController component is an old legacy component.

fields.Stream: The audio stream this is controlling.
fields.AudioOutput: The audio output being used to play the stream.
fields.IsPlayingForOwner: Whether the audio stream is playing for the user who spawned it.

methods.OnToggleBroadcast: Used to change the audio to broadcast.
methods.OnTogglePlayForOwner: Used to make the audio play for the stream owner.
